## [09:03 - 11:32]

came in, which was unexpected, because this isn't about testing Ryus and performance. And what I would say is, don't get caught up with any sales that do come up, because there's no significance yet at the sale level. So this is literally one person that happened to add to car and initiate checkout and go all the way through, granted the ad that we created in the landing page was really good. So we kind of already knew that. But we were just looking at testing at this stage. And what the test is telling me and kind of what I take from this is, if I want to be running graduation testing, and I want potentially the best pixel for me to find good buyers at a good price, then actually for me, add to cart or initiate checkout or actually good proxies for me to do my graduation testing in other accounts, it might be different. So, you know, view content or even PE would be better. The reason I don't generally go with purchase for the testing stage is because these people are more likely in market, and the cost will generally be higher and the click for rate lower, because these are more in buying mode. And when I'm doing graduation testing, I want to spend the least amount of money and get the fastest outcomes so that I can actually take the performance I've got and actually move it into test phase.
